tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetches a website and returns its content

tools.name: onboarding
tools.description: Get the onboarding instruction for LLM to act independently from model vendor

tools.name: get_croissant_record
tools.description: Convert a dataset to Croissant ML format with get_croissant_record tool and explore the dataset with DOI or handle.

tools.name: datatool
tools.description: Process a file in a dataset with DOI with datatool tool

tools.name: overview
tools.description: Get an overview of the Dataverse installations around the world sorted by country. Entrance point for the overview tools if no hosts are provided.

tools.name: overview_datasets
tools.description: Get an overview of the Dataverse datasets statistics by host

host.description: Host of the Dataverse installation (e.g. dataverse.nl)

tools.name: overview_files
tools.description: Get an overview of the Dataverse files statistics by host

host.description: Host of the Dataverse installation (e.g. dataverse.nl)

tools.name: search_datasets
tools.description: Search for datasets in a Dataverse installation

host.description: Host of the Dataverse installation (e.g. dataverse.nl)
